sn43.2:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I will teach you the unconditioned and the path leading to the unconditioned. Listen to that … .
sn43.2:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is the unconditioned? The destruction of lust, the destruction of hatred, the destruction of delusion: this is called the unconditioned.
sn43.2:1.3: "And what, bhikkhus, is the path leading to the unconditioned? Serenity and insight: this is called the path leading to the unconditioned … ."
